name: Softr Jobs → AI Report → PDF Email

nodes.name: 📋 Fetch Jobs (Airtable / Softr)
nodes.notes: Reads Airtable — the database Softr sits on top of. Pulls Submitted jobs that have Notes and haven't been processed.

parameters.pythonCode:
# ── STEP 1: STRUCTURING (NO AI) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# Maps raw Airtable fields to a clean internal schema.
#
# Real Jobs table columns:
#   Job Title, Job Number, Status, Scheduled Date, Priority,
#   Customer Name, Service Address, Description, Notes,
#   Submitted At, Completed At, Assigned Technician, Job Updates, Customer email

import json
from datetime import datetime

records = _input.first().json.get('records', [])
output = []

for record in records:
    f = record.get('fields', {})

    # Job Updates: semicolon-delimited string -> list
    raw_updates = f.get('Job Updates', '')
    if isinstance(raw_updates, list):
        job_updates = [u.strip() for u in raw_updates if u.strip()]
    elif isinstance(raw_updates, str) and raw_updates:
        job_updates = [u.strip() for u in raw_updates.split(';') if u.strip()]
    else:
        job_updates = []

    # Timestamps -> ISO strings + duration in minutes
    def parse_dt(val):
        if not val:
            return None
        try:
            return datetime.fromisoformat(val.replace('Z', '+00:00'))
        except (ValueError, AttributeError):
            return None

    submitted_dt = parse_dt(f.get('Submitted At'))
    completed_dt = parse_dt(f.get('Completed At'))

    duration_mins = None
    if submitted_dt and completed_dt:
        delta = completed_dt - submitted_dt
        duration_mins = round(delta.total_seconds() / 60)

    job = {
        'record_id':           record.get('id', ''),
        'job_number':          f.get('Job Number', record.get('id', '')),
        'job_title':           f.get('Job Title', 'General Service'),
        'status':              f.get('Status', 'Submitted'),
        'priority':            f.get('Priority', 'Normal'),
        'scheduled_date':      f.get('Scheduled Date', ''),
        'customer_name':       f.get('Customer Name', 'Unknown Customer'),
        'customer_email':      f.get('Customer email', ''),
        'service_address':     f.get('Service Address', ''),
        'description':         f.get('Description', ''),
        'technician_notes':    f.get('Notes', ''),
        'assigned_technician': f.get('Assigned Technician', 'Unknown'),
        'job_updates':         job_updates,
        'submitted_at':        submitted_dt.isoformat() if submitted_dt else None,
        'completed_at':        completed_dt.isoformat() if completed_dt else None,
        'duration_mins':       duration_mins,
    }

    output.append({'json': job})

return output

nodes.name: 🗂 STEP 1: Structure & Map Fields
nodes.notes: NO AI — pure Python. Maps every Airtable column to a normalised internal schema. Job Updates split on semicolons.

parameters.pythonCode:
# ── STEP 2: LIGHT AI — Claude Haiku ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Cleans messy technician notes, extracts structured issues, converts to JSON.
# Uses the cheapest model — runs for every job.
#
# Inputs consumed: description, technician_notes (Notes column), job_updates

import json
import urllib.request

job = _input.first().json

# Build the raw text block for the AI
parts = []
if job.get('description'):
    parts.append(f"CUSTOMER-REPORTED ISSUE:\n{job['description']}")
if job.get('technician_notes'):
    parts.append(f"TECHNICIAN NOTES:\n{job['technician_notes']}")
if job.get('job_updates'):
    updates_str = '\n'.join(f'- {u}' for u in job['job_updates'])
    parts.append(f"JOB UPDATES (milestones):\n{updates_str}")

raw_text = '\n\n'.join(parts) or 'No notes provided.'

system_prompt = """You are a field service data processor. Extract structured information from technician notes and job updates.
Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no explanation, no markdown fences, no preamble.

Output schema:
{
  "cleaned_notes": "grammar-corrected, de-duplicated summary of what was done",
  "issues_found": ["specific problems identified"],
  "work_performed": ["tasks completed — derive from job updates and notes"],
  "parts_replaced": ["parts installed or replaced — empty list if none mentioned"],
  "urgent_flags": ["anything urgent or safety-related — empty list if none"],
  "follow_up_required": true,
  "follow_up_reason": "string or null"
}"""

payload = json.dumps({
    'model': 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
    'max_tokens': 600,
    'system': system_prompt,
    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': raw_text}]
}).encode('utf-8')

req = urllib.request.Request(
    'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',
    data=payload,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': _env.get('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', ''),
        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
        'content-type': 'application/json'
    },
    method='POST'
)

try:
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
        response_data = json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))
    ai_result = json.loads(response_data['content'][0]['text'].strip())
except Exception:
    # Graceful fallback — never block the pipeline on AI failure
    ai_result = {
        'cleaned_notes':      job.get('technician_notes', 'Notes could not be parsed.'),
        'issues_found':       [],
        'work_performed':     job.get('job_updates', []),
        'parts_replaced':     [],
        'urgent_flags':       ['AI parsing failed — manual review required'],
        'follow_up_required': False,
        'follow_up_reason':   None
    }

return [{'json': {**job, 'ai': ai_result}}]

nodes.name: 🤖 STEP 2: Light AI — Clean & Extract (Haiku)
nodes.notes: Claude Haiku — cheapest model, runs on every job. Cleans Notes + Description + Job Updates into structured JSON.

nodes.name: ⚙️ STEP 3: Business Logic — Compliance & Rules
nodes.notes: NO AI — pure Python rules engine. Checks compliance, detects missing data, keyword-triggers upsells.

nodes.name: 🚦 Can Send Report?
nodes.notes: TRUE → generate AI report and PDF. FALSE → log blocked job.

nodes.name: ✨ STEP 4: Premium AI — Generate Report (Sonnet)
nodes.notes: Claude Sonnet — only runs on jobs that cleared compliance. Writes customer narrative + internal report.

parameters.pythonCode:
# ── PDF HTML BUILDER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Generates a complete A4-ready HTML report from all upstream data. # Real column values used throughout. from datetime import datetime, timezone job = _input.first().json ai = job.get('ai', {}) rc = job.get('report_content', {}) cs = rc.get('customer_summary', {}) ir = rc.get('internal_report', {}) comp = job.get('compliance', {}) # ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── def fmt_date(iso_str): if not iso_str: return 'Not recorded' try: dt = datetime.fromisoformat(iso_str.replace('Z', '+00:00')) return dt.strftime('%-d %B %Y at %I:%M %p') except (ValueError, AttributeError): return iso_str duration = job.get('duration_mins') if duration: h, m = divmod(duration, 60) dur_str = f"{h}h {m}m" if h else f"{m}m" else: dur_str = 'N/A' priority = job.get('priority', 'Normal') priority_colour = {'High': '#DC2626', 'Medium': '#D97706', 'Low': '#16A34A'}.get(priority, '#374151') # ── Sub-components ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Urgent banner urgent_flags = [f for f in ai.get('urgent_flags', []) if 'manual review' not in f.lower()] urgent_banner = '' if urgent_flags: flags_html = '
'.join(urgent_flags) urgent_banner = f"""
⚠ Action Required

{flags_html}

""" # Job updates timeline (from Job Updates column) updates = job.get('job_updates', []) if updates: steps = ''.join( f'
  • ✓ {u}
    • ' for u in updates ) updates_html = f'
      {steps}
    ' else: updates_html = '

    No update milestones recorded

    ' # Parts tags parts = ai.get('parts_replaced', []) parts_html = ''.join( f'{p}' for p in parts ) if parts else 'None' # Recommendations recs = cs.get('recommendations') or comp.get('upsells', []) recs_html = '
      ' + \ ''.join(f'
    • {r}
      • ' for r in recs) + \ '
    ' if recs else '

    No specific recommendations at this time

    ' # Upsell box upsells = comp.get('upsells', []) upsell_html = '' if upsells: items = ''.join(f'
  • {u}
    • ' for u in upsells) upsell_html = f"""
    💡 Service Opportunities
      {items}
    """ # Compliance warnings (internal) warnings_text = '
    '.join(comp.get('warnings', [])) or 'None' # Generated timestamp generated = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%-d %B %Y at %H:%M UTC') # ── Full HTML ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── html = f"""
    Service Report
    Job #{job.get('job_number', 'N/A')}  ·  {job.get('job_title', 'General Service')}
    {priority} Priority
    Scheduled: {job.get('scheduled_date', 'Not scheduled')}
    {job.get('customer_name', 'N/A')}
    {job.get('service_address', 'N/A')}
    {job.get('assigned_technician', 'N/A')}
    {fmt_date(job.get('submitted_at'))}
    {fmt_date(job.get('completed_at'))}
    {dur_str}
    {urgent_banner}

    Summary of Work

    {cs.get('headline', '')}

    {cs.get('what_we_did', '').replace(chr(10), '

    ')}

    What We Found

    {cs.get('what_we_found', ', '.join(ai.get('issues_found', [])) or 'No issues found during this visit.')}

    Parts & Materials Used

    {parts_html}

    Work Completed

    {updates_html}

    Our Recommendations

    {recs_html} {upsell_html}

    Next Steps

    {cs.get('next_steps', 'No follow-up required at this time.')}

    Internal Report INTERNAL USE ONLY

    Technical Summary

    {ir.get('technical_summary', ai.get('cleaned_notes', 'No technical notes.'))}

    Root Cause Analysis

    {ir.get('root_cause_analysis', 'N/A')}

    Compliance & Safety Notes

    {ir.get('compliance_notes', warnings_text)}

    Billing Notes

    {ir.get('billing_notes', f'Duration: {dur_str}. Parts: none.')}

    Generated {generated} Job #{job.get('job_number', 'N/A')}  ·  {job.get('customer_name', '')}
    """ return [{'json': {**job, 'pdf_html': html}}]

nodes.name: 📄 Build PDF HTML
nodes.notes: Pure Python f-string template. Builds full A4 HTML from real column names. Job Updates rendered as a checklist timeline.

nodes.name: 🖨 Convert HTML → PDF
nodes.notes: Requires n8n-nodes-html-pdf community node. Alternatively swap for a Gotenberg HTTP call (one Docker image).

parameters.subject: =Your Service Report — {{$json.job_title}} | {{$json.job_number}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.customer_name}},

Thank you for choosing us. Please find your service report attached for the {{$json.job_title}} completed at {{$json.service_address}}.

{{$json.report_content.customer_summary.headline}}

{{$json.report_content.customer_summary.next_steps}}

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Kind regards,
The Service Team

nodes.name: 📧 Email Report to Client
nodes.notes: Sends PDF to Customer email from the Jobs table. CC's internal ops. Configure SMTP credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: ✅ Mark as Sent in Airtable
nodes.notes: Updates Status to Completed and writes cleaned notes back. Prevents reprocessing on next poll.

parameters.pythonCode:
# ── ERROR LOG: Jobs that failed compliance checks ─────────────────────────────
# Logs to n8n console. Uncomment Slack block to alert ops team.

job    = _input.first().json
issues = job.get('compliance', {}).get('issues', [])

lines = [f"[JOB BLOCKED] {job.get('job_number', 'unknown')} — {job.get('customer_name', 'unknown')}"]
for i in issues:
    lines.append(f"  {i.get('severity', 'INFO')}: {i.get('message', '')}")

print('\n'.join(lines))

# Optional Slack alert — set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n Variables
# import urllib.request, json as _json
# webhook = _env.get('SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL', '')
# if webhook:
#     payload = _json.dumps({'text': '\n'.join(lines)}).encode()
#     urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(
#         webhook, data=payload,
#         headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST'
#     ))

return [{
    'json': {
        'job_number': job.get('job_number', 'unknown'),
        'customer':   job.get('customer_name', 'unknown'),
        'blocked':    True,
        'reason':     ' | '.join(f"[{i.get('severity')}] {i.get('message')}" for i in issues)
    }
}]

nodes.name: 🔴 Log Blocked Job
nodes.notes: Jobs failing CRITICAL checks land here. Logs to n8n console. Uncomment Slack block to alert ops.

nodes.name: ⏳ Rate Limit Pause
nodes.notes: 2s pause between jobs to avoid Anthropic API and SMTP rate limits when batch processing.

column_notes.Job Updates: Semicolon-delimited milestone string — split into list in Step 1
column_notes.Notes: Raw technician notes — cleaned by Haiku in Step 2
column_notes.Status: Poll targets 'Submitted'. Patched to 'Completed' after report sent.
column_notes.Customer email: Lowercase 'e' — match exactly as it appears in Airtable

required_n8n_variables: AIRTABLE_BASE_ID — appXXXXXXXX from your Airtable URL
optional_n8n_variables: SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL — uncomment Slack block in error log node
